---
title: "confusion_matrices"
output: html_document
---

# import data

need to import data
fix knn test variable for printing confusion matrix 

```{r}
test <- 


knn_pred <- readRDS("knn.rds")


```


```{r}

library(caret)


knn_bin <- ifelse(knn_pred == "0", "no", "yes")
knn_pred_clean <- factor(knn_bin, levels = c("no", "yes"))

saveRDS(knn_pred_clean, "knn_pred.rds")


y_true_char <- ifelse(test$y == 0, "no", "yes")
y_true <- factor(y_true_char, levels = c("no", "yes"))


confusionMatrix(knn_pred_clean, y_true, positive = "yes")

```
